creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 186212
Upgrade py-service_identity to 17.0.0

Trivially upgrade this port.  devel/py-twisted is actually using features from service_identity that were introduced in 17.0.0, even though twisted's setup.py file doesn't specify a version dependency.

Passes poudriere builds on 11.1 and 10.3.  Run tested by using Buildbot with this version of service_identity.
